title: 1 · Client requests a quote
narration: Welcome to White Glove Source. A designer or client starts on the public quote builder, entering contact details and the type of service they need.

title: 2 · Logistics and piece catalogue
narration: Next they add pickup and install addresses, storage preferences, and select pieces from the catalogue. The estimate updates instantly as rooms are filled in.

title: 3 · Submit quote request
narration: When they submit, the quote is saved and the client sees a confirmation with their estimated total. Our team is notified immediately.

title: 4 · Owner notification email
narration: In development, outbound email is intercepted by Mailpit. Here is the notification sent to the owner when a new quote request arrives — nothing goes to a real inbox.

title: 5 · Admin dashboard
narration: The admin opens the control panel dashboard to see pipeline totals — proposals, pending quotes, and projects in progress — all with dollar values at a glance.

title: 6 · Quote detail and audit trail
narration: Opening the quote shows full contact and logistics details, plus an audit trail that records every change and message for accountability.

title: 7 · Send quote for client approval
narration: The admin sets the final quoted amount, saves, and sends the quote to the client for approval. That triggers a formatted approval email.

title: 8 · Client approval email
narration: In Mailpit, here is the email the client would receive — line items, logistics, quoted amount, and instructions to reply with approval.

title: 9 · Create project from quote
narration: Once approved, the admin assigns a designer and client, then creates a project seeded with rooms and pieces from the quote catalogue.

title: 10 · Project inventory
narration: The new project portal opens with inventory by room, phase signoffs, and the staging plan — ready for the operations team.

title: 11 · Full lifecycle demo
narration: The demo project shows a mature job: staging workflow, crew schedule with pickups, and inventory signoffs through installation.

title: 12 · Completed projects
narration: Finished projects move to the completed list. From first quote request through email, audit, and delivery — White Glove Source keeps every step visible.
